title: galeopsis eversiana
intro: Galeopsis eversiana, also known as Evers' Hemp-nettle or Hemp-nettle, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Galeopsis eversiana include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Galeopsis eversiana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
